comments.body:
## Description

Implement _phase_version_bump in merge-to-main.sh and the --bump CLI flag. This is the core implementation task.

## TDD Requirement

Task 438b-fd0a must be completed first (tests must be RED). After this implementation, all tests in tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh must pass (GREEN).

## Implementation Steps

### 1. Add --bump CLI flag parsing (near other arg parsing, around line 1288-1303)

Parse --bump and --bump minor in the CLI arg parsing loop:
  _CLI_BUMP_TYPE=patch  # default
  --bump) _CLI_BUMP_TYPE=patch ;;
  --bump|--bump=patch) _CLI_BUMP_TYPE=patch ;;
  --bump minor) handle two-arg case
Actually: --bump accepts the next argument as the bump type. Use a two-pass or look-ahead approach consistent with existing flag parsing in the script.

### 2. Expose BUMP_TYPE globally

Set BUMP_TYPE from _CLI_BUMP_TYPE after parsing. Used by _phase_version_bump.

### 3. Add _phase_version_bump() function (between _phase_merge and _phase_validate)

_phase_version_bump() {
    _CURRENT_PHASE=version_bump
    _state_write_phase version_bump

    # Read version.file_path from config (already loaded via --batch eval at top)
    local _version_file_path="${VERSION_FILE_PATH:-}"
    if [[ -z "$_version_file_path" ]]; then
        echo 'INFO: version.file_path not configured -- skipping version bump.'
        _state_mark_complete version_bump
        return 0
    fi

    # Call bump-version.sh with the bump type
    local _bump_flag="--${BUMP_TYPE:-patch}"
    echo "Bumping version ($_bump_flag)..."
    if ! bash "$_SCRIPT_DIR/bump-version.sh" "$_bump_flag" 2>&1; then
        echo 'ERROR: bump-version.sh failed. Fix version file before pushing.'
        exit 1
    fi
    echo "OK: Version bumped."

    # Stage and fold into merge commit (same pattern as _phase_validate)
    git add -u 2>/dev/null || true
    if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
        git commit --amend --no-edit --quiet
        echo 'OK: Folded version bump into merge commit.'
    fi

    _state_mark_complete version_bump
}

### 4. Add version_bump to _ALL_PHASES

Insert between merge and validate in _ALL_PHASES:
_ALL_PHASES=(sync merge version_bump validate push archive ci_trigger)

### 5. Add _phase_version_bump call in sequential execution block

After _phase_merge, add: _phase_version_bump

### 6. Read VERSION_FILE_PATH from config batch

In the read-config.sh --batch eval block, ensure version.file_path maps to VERSION_FILE_PATH. Check the existing batch eval and add if missing.

### 7. Update --help text

Add --bump [minor] to the usage block.

## Key Constraints (from story considerations)

- Version bump MUST be folded into the merge commit via amend (NOT a separate commit) — a separate commit would trigger Layer 1 review gate requiring review-status + diff hash
- Failure in _phase_version_bump must exit non-zero BEFORE _phase_push runs
- BUMP_TYPE default is 'patch'; --bump minor sets it to 'minor'
- When version.file_path is absent from config, skip silently (exit 0)
- PRE_MERGE_SHA (used by _phase_ci_trigger) must remain valid — amending the merge commit preserves the SHA set in _phase_merge (PRE_MERGE_SHA is set before the merge, not after)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh passes (all GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh
- [ ] _phase_version_bump function exists in merge-to-main.sh
  Verify: grep -q "_phase_version_bump()" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
- [ ] _ALL_PHASES contains version_bump between merge and validate
  Verify: grep "_ALL_PHASES" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh | grep -q "merge.*version_bump.*validate"
- [ ] --bump flag is parsed in the script
  Verify: grep -q "CLI_BUMP_TYPE\|BUMP_TYPE" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
- [ ] --help output includes bump flag documentation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh --help 2>&1 | grep -q "bump"
- [ ] Syntax check passes on merge-to-main.sh
  Verify: python3 -c "import subprocess; r=subprocess.run(['bash','-c','bash -n $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh 2>&1'],capture_output=True); exit(r.returncode)"
- [ ] Version bump uses amend to fold into merge commit
  Verify: grep -A 20 "_phase_version_bump()" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh | grep -q "amend"
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment (from Step 6)

### Gap: _phase_version_bump double-bump on --resume

If _phase_version_bump is interrupted after modifying the version file but before _state_mark_complete is called, --resume will re-run the phase and call bump-version.sh again, producing a double increment (e.g., 0.1.1 → 0.1.2 instead of staying at 0.1.1).

### Required fix

_phase_version_bump must be idempotent with respect to --resume. Before calling bump-version.sh, check whether the version file was already modified in the current merge commit (compared to its pre-merge state). If it was already bumped, skip the bump and proceed to mark_complete.

Implementation approach:
  # Read version from origin/main (pre-merge baseline)
  _pre_merge_version=
  # Read current version from working tree
  _current_version=
  if [[ -n "_pre_merge_version" && "_current_version" != "_pre_merge_version" ]]; then
    echo 'INFO: Version already bumped in this merge (resume skip).'
    _state_mark_complete version_bump
    return 0
  fi

### Additional acceptance criterion to add

- [ ] _phase_version_bump is idempotent: if version file was already bumped in the current merge commit, calling the phase again skips the bump and exits 0
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_version_bump_phase_idempotent_on_resume.*PASS'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: _phase_version_bump added to merge-to-main.sh with --bump flag, amend pattern, idempotency guard, and marker cleanup. All 13 tests GREEN.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
